description: Error on SCF non-convergence in CP2K log files

diagnostics.hint: Increase MAX_SCF or tighten EPS_SCF; consider a better initial guess.
diagnostics.explanation: The self-consistent field cycle did not reach the requested convergence threshold.
diagnostics.suggested_action: Raise MAX_SCF, tighten EPS_SCF, switch to OT, or improve the initial guess (SCF_GUESS RESTART).
